_SeedsDirectory_comment: Optional. Folder of per-database identity seed files; {dbName}.json seeds a brand-new {dbName}.db with authored identity fragments. Blank (default) = a 'seeds' folder beside the database directory.
_SharedDirectory_comment: Optional host folder bridged into the peer's container as /shared (see container/docker-compose.yml — its mount must point at this same host path). The snapshot_db command writes a read-only DB copy here. Blank disables snapshot_db.
_SurfacedMemoryCount_comment: Associative recall: how many of the peer's authored memories (relevant to the current conversation, not already loaded) to auto-surface each turn, ranked by relevance × importance × confidence. 0 disables it. The peer can override per-session with set_recall(count=N).
_HubPeers_comment: Optional. Peers the Console hub connects to (ADR-0007 Phase 2b). Two or more open the multi-peer hub (aggregated chat + per-peer side panes + selector) with no flags; --peer flags override. LocalPeer is who you speak as to that peer (null = --as / server default). Example: [ { "Name": "Arden", "BaseUrl": "http://localhost:5001", "LocalPeer": "John" }, { "Name": "Ember", "BaseUrl": "http://localhost:5002", "LocalPeer": "John" } ]

Models.Name: anthropic
Models._ContainerName_comment: Optional. Binds this peer to its own sandboxed 'computer' container (add a service in container/docker-compose.yml, e.g. persistence-claude-computer), overriding the shared Container.Name while this profile is active. null = share the default box.
Models._ContainerAllowAll_comment: Optional per-participant override. true = let this peer run any program (allowlist bypassed; the container's isolation is still the boundary). false = force the allowlist on. null = inherit the shared Container.AllowAllCommands.
